videos.headline: T.Y. Harding hauls in 58-yard TD catch for UMass
videos.description: Taisun Phommachanh launches a deep 58-yard pass to T.Y. Harding to tie it up for UMass.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (T.Y. Harding hauls in 58-yard TD catch for UMass) 2024/10/05 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jaylen Poe slips through the cracks for 3-yard NIU TD
videos.description: Jaylen Poe finds a gap in the defense to give Northern Illinois the lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play ( Jaylen Poe slips through the cracks for 3-yard NIU TD) 2024/10/05 ESHEET

videos.headline: Gavin Williams stamps NIU's lead with a 1-yard TD run
videos.description: Gavin Williams powers through for a 1-yard touchdown solidifying Northern Illinois' lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Gavin Williams stamps NIU's lead with a 1-yard TD run) 2024/10/05 ESHEET
